---
title: "ML Concepts"
subtitle: "The machine learning ideas that power every modern CV system"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date asc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  include:
    categories: "{ml-concepts}"
  fields: [date, title, description, reading-time]
---

```{=html}
<div class="pp-series-hero">
  <span class="pp-series-badge badge-b">Series B</span>
  <p class="pp-series-intro">
    Loss functions, overfitting, regularisation, batch normalisation, attention mechanisms — the core ML ideas that students name-drop without truly understanding. This series assumes you are comfortable with Series A. Each post answers one question properly.
  </p>
  <div class="pp-series-nav">
    <a href="index.html">← All Series</a>
  </div>
</div>
```
